form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished last over 350m at this track beaten 17 lengths (21.01) behind Kingsbrae Brett in a NG on February 17. Placed two back at this track. Has an exceptional 19.78 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on January 20 at this track over 350m. Last start was third over 350m in 20.15, behind My Warrior. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.
